subcodes.title: Words to the minister of the New Congregational Church, spoken on 1913-01-13
subcodes.first_line: I am only a servant of God. The station of servitude is very great. It is very difficult for any one to live in accord with the requirements of servitude
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @knowledge; recognition of God
